params.name: task_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the task.

params.name: custom_task_ids
params.description: If you want to reference a task by its custom task ID, this value must be true.

params.name: team_id
params.description: Required when custom_task_ids is set to true. The Workspace ID.

params.name: start
params.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds to start from for pagination.

params.name: start_id
params.description: Comment ID to start from for pagination.

items.docs: Retrieves all comments on a specific task. Comments are returned in chronological order and include user information, timestamps, and formatted content.

params.name: task_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the task.

params.name: custom_task_ids
params.description: If you want to reference a task by its custom task ID, this value must be true.

params.name: team_id
params.description: Required when custom_task_ids is set to true. The Workspace ID.

items.docs: Creates a new comment on a task. Comments can include plain text, rich text formatting with mentions, and can be assigned to users for follow-up. The assignee will be notified of the comment.

params.name: view_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the view.

params.name: start
params.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds to start from for pagination.

params.name: start_id
params.description: Comment ID to start from for pagination.

items.docs: Retrieves all comments on a specific view.

params.name: view_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the view.

items.docs: Creates a new comment on a view.

params.name: list_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the list.

params.name: start
params.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds to start from for pagination.

params.name: start_id
params.description: Comment ID to start from for pagination.

items.docs: Retrieves all comments on a specific list.

params.name: list_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the list.

items.docs: Creates a new comment on a list.

params.name: comment_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the comment.

items.docs: Updates an existing comment. The comment text and assignee can be modified. The resolved status can also be toggled.

params.name: comment_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the comment.

items.docs: Permanently deletes a comment. This action cannot be undone.
